posts.text: Reminder… I don’t have WhatsApp chats and just offer my own opinions on X. There’s endless imposter accounts and scammers. Check the spelling of my handle in my posts. Do your own due diligence always… there’s not guarantees in any market or stocks. All we can do is research and try our best to predict the future.
posts.author: BambroughKevin

posts.text: HydroGraph ($HG | $HGRAF) has signed agreements with Western International to support a Texas graphene manufacturing facility. The Bellville site is designed for up to 360 tons/year of Fractal Graphene™, with expansion potential beyond 750 tons/year. 📖 https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/07/14/3326908/0/en/hydrograph-and-western-international-sign-agreements-for-planned-texas-graphene-manufacturing-facility.html
posts.author: HydroGraphInc
